## Validation
- [ ] `make check` or equivalent checks ran locally

## Plugin Developer API Docs Checklist
Use for API-affecting changes only. See:
- `docs/plugin-developer-api-review-checklist.md`
- `docs/plugin-developer-api-versioning-policy.md`

- [ ] N/A - no plugin developer API surface or behavior changes
- [ ] API reference updated (`docs/plugin-developer-api-reference.md`)
- [ ] Integration guide updated (`docs/register-action-with-edmchotkeys.md`) if examples/workflow changed
- [ ] Troubleshooting updated (`docs/plugin-developer-api-troubleshooting.md`) if failure modes changed
- [ ] Release notes updated for `breaking`/`behavioral`/`additive` changes
- [ ] Compatibility label + change classification applied per policy
